\tzpentry{ID4458}{Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4458 introduces Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\mathcal{R}_T = \left( \mathcal{R} + 2\Lambda - \frac{8\pi G}{c^4} \mathcal{T}_{\text{topo}} \right) \cdot \exp\left( \frac{\Phi_{\text{TZP}}}{P_T} \right) \cdot \chi_T$$
